# Agent-Native

> Framework for building apps where the AI agent and the UI are equal partners.

Agent-Native is an open source framework for building full-featured applications powered by AI agents. Everything the UI can do, the agent can do — and vice versa. They share the same database, the same state, and they always stay in sync. You don't think about "the agent" and "the app" separately — you think about them together.

## Core Principles

- **Agent + UI parity**: Everything the UI can do, the agent can do. Search email, compose a draft, create a calendar event, generate slides — both sides have full access, always in sync.
- **Context-aware**: The agent always knows what you're looking at. If an email is open, it knows which one. Select text and hit Cmd+I — it can act on just that selection.
- **Skills-driven**: Core functionalities have instructions so the agent doesn't explore from scratch. When you add a feature, you update all four areas: UI, actions, skills, and application state.
- **Inter-agent communication**: Agents discover and call each other via the A2A protocol. Tag your analytics agent from the mail app to pull data into a draft.
- **Fully portable**: Any SQL database Drizzle supports, any hosting backend Nitro supports, any AI coding tool (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.). Non-negotiable.
- **Fork and customize**: Single-tenant apps you clone and evolve. The agent modifies the app's own code, so it gets better over time. Builder.io provides hosting and services that make this easy.

## Quick Start

The fastest way to get started is to pick a template. Templates are complete, production-ready apps — not starter kits.

```bash
npx @agent-native/core create my-app --template mail
cd my-app
pnpm install
pnpm dev
```

Replace `mail` with any template name below. To start from a blank canvas instead, omit `--template`.

## Templates

- **Mail**: Superhuman-style email client with keyboard shortcuts, AI triage, and smart search — `--template mail`
- **Calendar**: Calendar app with Google Calendar sync, public booking page, and natural language scheduling — `--template calendar`
- **Content**: Content workspace with brand-aware AI writing, CMS publishing, media management — `--template content`
- **Slides**: AI presentation builder with 8 layouts, image generation, visual editing — `--template slides`
- **Video**: Video composition studio built on Remotion with track-based animation — `--template video`
- **Analytics**: BI platform with 20+ data connectors, SQL query explorer, dashboards, data dictionary — `--template analytics`

## Documentation (Markdown)

All documentation pages are available as raw markdown by appending `.md` to any docs URL. This makes it easy for LLMs and automated tools to consume the docs directly.

- [Getting Started](https://agent-native.com/docs/getting-started.md)
